     the Fermi energy is     2.2468 ev

!    total energy              =   -8184.66926144 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          4.0E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.29139429 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -281037.77291553 Ry
